content:
Nepal — The Land of Himalayas#Nepal is home to 8 of the world’s 14 highest peaks including Mount Everest.
Must Visit Places#🏔️ Pokhara — City of lakes and mountains 🛕 Kathmandu — Historic temples and culture 🦏 Chitwan — Wildlife and nature Stay tuned for detailed travel guides!

title: Exploring the Beauty of Nepal

content:
What is a Network?#A network is a collection of computers and devices connected together to share resources.
Key Concepts#IP Address — Unique address for each device Switch — Connects devices within a LAN Router — Connects different networks together Firewall — Protects network from unauthorized access More detailed guides coming soon!
summary:

title: Introduction to Networking — Basics for Beginners
